indicators.realGdpGrowth: WEO NGDP_RPCH (real GDP, % change), baselineYear value
indicators.primaryBalance: WEO GGXONLB_NGDP (% of GDP), baselineYear value
indicators.realInterestRate: Implicit effective real rate — back-solved from r = (d_t + pb) × (1+g/100) / d_{t-1} - 1 using WEO GGXWDG_NGDP at baselineYear and the previously-extracted g/pb/d_{t-1}. Clamped to [-20%, +50%]; outliers set null.
indicators.realFxAppreciation: Default 0 (WEO does not publish forward real FX appreciation); curate per-country in v3+
indicators.fcuShare: Default 0 (WEO does not publish FCU share); curate from IMF Article IV / BIS in v3+
indicators.baselineProjection: WEO GGXWDG_NGDP year-by-year from baselineYear (2026) to last published projection year (2031). This is WEO's own debt-to-GDP path — used as the chart's baseline line. The user's projection line is recomputed from sliders by the engine.
indicators.yearlyDefaults: Per-year slider defaults across the projection horizon. Each indicator (realGdpGrowth, realInterestRate, primaryBalance, realFxAppreciation, fcuShare) is an array of length horizon_years (6 for v2). r_t is back-solved year-by-year from WEO's published d_t using the debt-dynamics identity, so engine(yearlyDefaults) matches WEO baselineProjection exactly at every year (when all inputs are present).

notes: 172 of 189 countries have realInterestRate populated via the implicit method; 17 are null (6 computed outliers outside [-20%, +50%]; 11 missing input data for g/pb/d_t).
realFxAppreciation defaults to 0; WEO does not publish forward real FX appreciation.
fcuShare defaults to 0; WEO does not publish; flagged for future curation.
Note: for some countries the LATEST_ACTUAL_ANNUAL_DATA is 2024 or earlier; 2025 values are then WEO projections, not actuals. All values come from the WEO download.
Some countries report on fiscal year (e.g., FY2024/25). Calendar-year columns in the WEO database reflect WEO staff conversions; values taken as-is.
